remove.title: Remove workspace

list.empty: No workspaces yet. Click + to add a directory.

history.askQuestion: 🙋 Asked to answer one question · AskUserQuestion | 🙋 Asked to answer {count} questions · AskUserQuestion
history.saveIntents: 💾 Asked to save one intent | 💾 Asked to save {count} intents

readOnlyNotice.text: You are not the administrator. System settings are read-only.

hint.text: New sessions launch with the default agent. Each agent has a type ({claude} / Codex) and either uses system config or a custom Base URL / API Key / Model. Toggle {on} to enable an agent; a disabled agent is excluded from discussion participants, consensus voting, the degradation chain, and the default picker — but bound or fallback launches still work, so no existing session is locked out.

default.tooltip: Only an enabled agent can be the default

tool.tooltip: Agent that runs background tool sessions (completion judge, summary)

intent.tooltip: Agent that runs intent-communication sessions (requirement breakdown)

spec.tooltip: Agent that runs spec-authoring sessions (writing project specs)

vendor.tooltip: Agent type — which client launches this agent

configMode.tooltip: Provider config source: system (use the CLI’s own config) or custom (set Base URL / API Key / Model)

wireApi.tooltip: Which API the provider speaks: Chat Completions (routed through c3’s relay) or Responses (connected directly)

agents.defaultNote: Changing the default agent is not retroactive: it affects {pending} pending session(s); {bound} bound session(s) keep their original vendor.

defaultMode.hint: The permission mode new sessions start in. You can still switch a session's mode at any time from its header.

devSkill.hint: When starting a development task, this slash command is prepended to the intent text. Leave it empty to add no skill prefix.

rounds.hint: The maximum number of speaking rounds a multi-agent discussion spends in each workflow stage before the organizer is forced to advance. Higher values allow deeper, longer discussions. Minimum {min} (lower values are clamped up on save).

speechChars.hint: The per-turn character budget participants see in their prompt guidance. Participants are asked to keep replies within this limit, but over-long replies are accepted verbatim (no hard truncation). Minimum {min} (lower values are clamped up on save).

displayLang.hint: The language of the c3 web console UI. Changes apply immediately without a reload and are saved to the server. Independent from the voice input language below.

voiceLang.hint: The language the browser's speech recognition listens for when you use the microphone in the message box. Voice input is provided by the browser (Chrome/Edge) and may require a network connection.

timezone.hint: The IANA time zone used to interpret every schedule's cron expression when computing its next run. For example, 0 11 * * * means 11:00 in this zone. Defaults to the server's local time zone; changing it shifts when existing schedules actually fire.

hint1.text: When enabled, an allow/deny permission prompt is first put to the {other} configured agents. Each judges the tool call from the recent context and votes allow/deny with a reason; the session's own agent then summarizes their opinions. If every voter agrees, the prompt auto-resolves with no human needed — otherwise you decide, with each agent's vote and reason shown. Any error, timeout, or unparseable answer counts as an abstain, which keeps the decision with you. Needs at least one agent besides the session's own.

hint2.text: {ask} (where the agent asks {you} a multiple-choice question) takes a separate per-question path. c3 always shows you an answer panel and injects your picks back to the agent — that is the only way to answer it without a terminal, so it works regardless of this toggle. The consensus part only kicks in when it's {on}: the voters answer every question and the decider summarizes and reconciles answers that mean the same thing, so questions everyone agrees on get pre-filled or auto-answered and only the rest are left for you. With consensus off, no voting runs and you fill the whole panel yourself.

majority.label: Allow majority rule (a tie or no clear majority still defers to you)

diagnostics.hint: Each agent type needs its vendor CLI available on PATH.

sandboxes.hint: Define sandbox templates that projects can reference for containerised execution. Each sandbox has a unique name, a container runtime type, an image, and optional resource limits / seccomp profile.

skillRepos.hint: External git repositories whose SKILL.md files are mounted into every supported vendor's skill discovery directory at the configured ref's latest head.

repo.parseHelp: Paste a GitHub URL — ref and subpath are extracted automatically

ref.required: A git ref (branch / tag / commit) is required

auth.hint: Require a sign-in to use this console. Set an admin account first, then turn authentication on.

none.hint: Anyone who can reach this server may use it — no sign-in required. The default for a local, single-user setup on localhost.

oauth.hint: Delegate sign-in to an external OpenID Connect provider (Google, Keycloak, or any compliant issuer).
oauth.runtimePending: OAuth contract is ready, but sign-in awaits the OAuth runtime. Enabling auth still works only with username & password for now.

clientSecretRef.label: Client secret reference
clientSecretRef.hint: A reference (env var name / keystore id) to the client secret — never the secret value itself.

allowedEmails.label: Allowed emails
allowedEmails.hint: Only these verified emails may sign in. An empty list authorizes nobody.

adminEmail.label: Admin email
adminEmail.hint: The single admin's email — must be one of the allowed emails above.

enable.needAdmin: Set an admin account below before sign-in takes effect.
enable.active: Sign-in is required. Users must enter the admin credentials to access this console.

password.hint: The password is hashed on the server; the plaintext is never stored or shown.

error.invalid: Enter a username and a password of at least 4 characters.

exposure.label: Allow network exposure
exposure.hint: Bind beyond localhost (0.0.0.0) so other machines can reach this console.
exposure.needAdmin: Set an admin account to allow network exposure.

ttl.label: Session lifetime (days)
ttl.hint: How long a sign-in stays valid before re-prompting. Default is 30 days. A server restart still signs everyone out.

account.hint: Add one or more accounts, then pick exactly one as the admin — the authority for changing system settings.

confirm.title: Remove account?
confirm.body: Remove the account "{username}"? This can't be undone.

error.admin_must_reassign: Pick another admin before removing the current admin account.

startDev.confirmUnfinishedDeps: This intent has unfinished dependencies. Start development anyway?

devLaunch.title: Starting development…
devLaunch.timeout: Couldn't confirm development startup. Please try again.

specLaunch.title: Starting spec session…
specLaunch.timeout: Couldn't confirm spec-session startup. Please try again.

new.label: New intent: start a new chat session

list.empty: No intents yet. Chat with the assistant on the right and save them.

start.label: ▶ Automation
start.tooltip: Start automation: complete the intents marked for automation one by one, by priority and dependencies

automation.awaitingGate: Waiting for manual session to complete

locked.toast: Only todo intents can switch auto/manual mode

spec.empty: No spec has been written for this intent yet.

intentSession.empty: This intent has no refine session yet.

specSession.empty: This intent has no spec session yet.

intentSession.title: Reset intent session
intentSession.message: Start a fresh refine session seeded with your new input and this intent's current content. The previous session stays available under Works but is no longer linked to this intent.

specSession.title: Reset spec session
specSession.message: Start a fresh spec session seeded with your new input and the current spec content. The previous session stays available under Works but is no longer linked to this intent.

resetSession.placeholder: What should change? Your input is combined with the current content to seed the new session.

team.upgraded: — Upgraded to a team session: the team lead keeps running and coordinating teammates until you click "End team" —

agent.crossVendorSkipped: — Skipped {count} cross-vendor fallback agent(s) ({agents}): a different vendor cannot resume this session's context —

expand.tooltip: Expand the session list (double its width)

collapse.tooltip: Collapse the session list back to normal width

list.deleteConfirm: Delete this session and its transcript? This cannot be undone.

intent.label: Intent
intent.ariaLabel: Open the intent that created this session

agent.vendorLocked: Created by {vendor} — vendor can't be changed
agent.unavailable: current agent unavailable — switch to another {vendor} agent to continue
agent.changeFailed: Couldn't switch agent: the session's vendor is fixed

statusBar.sideEffectPending: Unfinished write detected — continue after confirming no side effects

continue.label: Continue
continue.tooltip: Continue manually after confirming no side effects

stop.endTeamTooltip: End team: shut down the team lead and all teammates

placeholder.noSession: Select or create a session to start
placeholder.team: Team running — type a message to send to the team lead (anytime)
placeholder.running: Turn in progress — your message will be queued and merged into the next turn
placeholder.listening: Listening… click the mic again or press Esc to stop
placeholder.ready: Type a prompt — Enter×2 or ⌘/Ctrl+Enter to send, / for commands

sendHint.running: Turn in progress — your message will be queued
sendHint.ready: Press Enter twice, or ⌘/Ctrl+Enter to send

attach.rejected: Only images can be attached — other files were ignored.

queue.head: Queued · merged into the next turn ({count})

edit.tooltip: Edit: pull back into the input box to re-edit

chat.empty: Select a session, or create a new one in a workspace.

missing.hint: Some agent CLIs are not installed.

kind.placeholder: This session type will be connected in phase two.

templates.noAgent: No enabled Claude agent is available for this template.

prPoller.title: PR status polling check
prPoller.description: Reconcile reviewing intents with GitHub PR status every 10 minutes.

archReview.title: Weekly architecture stability review
archReview.description: Every Friday at 18:00, review the last 7 days of code changes and file high-value architecture improvements as draft intents.

vulnAnalysis.title: Weekly vulnerability analysis
vulnAnalysis.description: Every Monday at 09:00, analyze the last 7 days of code changes for security vulnerabilities and file confirmed findings as draft intents.

worktreeCleanup.title: 清除过期worktree
worktreeCleanup.description: Every Sunday at 03:00, remove stale c3-managed worktrees older than 7 days only when dirty, intent and branch safety gates pass.

delete.title: Delete schedule?
delete.confirm: Delete "{name}"? Its execution history is removed permanently — this can't be undone.

detail.title: {name} Logs
detail.noSessionRecord: No session record for this execution.
detail.empty: Select a schedule to view details.

history.title: Execution History
history.empty: Select a schedule to view its history.
history.tabEmpty: Select an execution to view its details.

execution.empty: Select an execution to view details.

session.noRecord: No session record for this execution.

title.label: Title
title.hint: Leave empty to revert to an auto-generated title.

taskType.label: Task type
taskType.locked: Task type cannot be changed after creation.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.placeholder: Run a security audit and summarize findings…

maxWallClockMs.label: Execution timeout (ms)
maxWallClockMs.hint: Leave empty for the task default (command: 30 seconds; LLM: 60 seconds).
maxWallClockMs.invalid: Enter a whole number between 1,000 and 86,400,000.

reason.label: Only on outcome
reason.hint: Leave empty to fire on any outcome.

pr.note: The model performs PR operations (create, review, merge, close, comment) with its own tools and publishes an event when done — c3 never executes PR operations itself. This schedule fires when a matching PR event is published in this workspace.
pr.hint: Leave a row empty to match any operation / result.

intent.label: Only on lifecycle phase
intent.hint: Leave empty to match every intent lifecycle phase.

event.hint: Fires when a run in this workspace reaches the selected event.

nextRun.label: Next run:
nextRun.utcHint: (shown in the configured time zone, e.g. Asia/Shanghai)

uiLang.saveFailed: Failed to save language setting. Reverted.

session.notSelected: Select or create a session first.
session.turnRunning: A turn is already running in this session.

prompt.unsupportedFile: Only images can be attached to a message (received "{mediaType}").

intent.renameChatSessionFailed: Failed to rename intent chat session: {detail}.
intent.deleteChatSessionFailed: Failed to delete intent chat session: {detail}.
intent.devStartInFlight: Development is already starting for this intent.
intent.gitCleanupNoChanges: The development session ended with no changes to commit. Commit, push, and open a PR manually.
intent.gitCleanupCommitPushFailed: Auto commit/push after the development session failed: {detail}. Resolve it manually.
intent.gitCleanupGhUnavailable: Cannot create the PR — the gh CLI is unavailable or not logged in: {detail}. Install/authenticate gh, then create the PR manually.
intent.gitCleanupPrFailed: Automatic PR creation failed: {detail}. Create the PR manually.
intent.pullFailed: The current branch has diverged from the remote and cannot fast-forward. Reconcile it manually before starting development: {message}
intent.dependencyNotMerged: Dependency "{title}" ({id}) has not been merged to the main branch yet.
intent.specAgentUnsupported: Spec authoring requires a Claude agent; the configured spec agent cannot confine writes to the spec directory.
intent.specWriteFailed: Failed to create the spec document: {message}.
intent.specNotWritten: The spec has not been written yet; author it before approving.
intent.specNotApproved: The spec has not been approved yet; approve it before starting development.

discussion.notConcludable: Only a concluded discussion with an outcome can become a intent.
discussion.alreadyStarted: Discussion already started or ended; cannot start again.
discussion.notEndedForContinue: Only an ended discussion can start a new round.

schedule.approvalNotFound: Approval entry not found or already handled.
schedule.invalidEventTrigger: An event-triggered schedule needs a run event to subscribe to.
schedule.invalidMaxWallClockMs: The execution timeout must be a whole number between 1,000 and 86,400,000 milliseconds.
schedule.agentNotFound: The selected execution agent no longer exists.
schedule.agentDisabled: The selected execution agent is disabled.
schedule.agentVendorMismatch: The selected agent does not match the schedule vendor.

waitUserInvolve.invalidStatusTransition: This WorkCenter message can no longer be marked done.

auth.oauthAdminInvalid: The admin email must be set and listed in the allowed emails.
auth.adminOnly: Only the administrator can change system settings.

license.notEntitled: Can't start a new session — {reason}. Activate or renew your license from the badge at the top.
license.workspaceLimit: Free plan allows up to {limit} workspaces.
license.worktreeLimit: Free plan allows only {limit} active worktree.
license.discussionParticipantLimit: Free plan allows up to {limit} discussion participants, not counting the organizer.
license.scheduleLimit: Free plan allows up to {limit} enabled schedules.
license.sandboxDisabled: Free plan can save sandbox settings, but cannot enable sandbox.

reason.disabled: your license is now bound to another installation

followUp.placeholder: Ask a follow-up to start a new round…

context.label: Context
context.placeholder: Background material (a research agent will complete it)

participants.label: Participants
participants.hint: Selected agents are invited to speak. Use the radio to designate the organizer.
participants.validationError: Organizer must be selected, and at least one other agent.

vendorScope.label: Consensus limited to {vendor} · {count} cross-vendor advisor(s) did not vote (tool/risk semantics are not comparable across vendors)

gitignore.title: .gitignore update needed
gitignore.detail: c3 needs to append entries matching "_c3_*" to this project's .gitignore before mounting external skills.

defaultMode.hint: Set the default permission mode for each vendor. New sessions use the launching vendor's mode; you can still switch a session's mode at any time from its header.

devSkill.hint: When starting a development task in this project, this slash command is prepended to the intent text. Leave it empty to add no skill prefix.

rounds.hint: The maximum number of speaking rounds a multi-agent discussion spends in each workflow stage before the organizer is forced to advance. Higher values allow deeper, longer discussions. Minimum {min} (lower values are clamped up on save).

speechChars.hint: The per-turn character budget participants see in their prompt guidance. Participants are asked to keep replies within this limit, but over-long replies are accepted verbatim (no hard truncation). Minimum {min} (lower values are clamped up on save).

gitBranchMode.hint: How Start development handles branches for this workspace: develop in place on the current branch, or isolate the dev agent in a git worktree.

defaultMainBranch.hint: The base branch new worktrees branch from in worktree mode. Auto-detected (origin/HEAD, then current HEAD) when this page opens.

sdd.hint: When enabled, development tasks in this workspace go through a spec quality gate with human approval checkpoints before coding starts.

specRoot.hint: Fixed, centralized location where this project's specs are stored (~/.c3/specs/[project]). Shared by every worktree of the project and read-only — it cannot be changed here or via the API. Not committed to Git.

hint1.text: When enabled, an allow/deny permission prompt is first put to the {other} configured agents. Each judges the tool call from the recent context and votes allow/deny with a reason; the session's own agent then summarizes their opinions. If every voter agrees, the prompt auto-resolves with no human needed — otherwise you decide, with each agent's vote and reason shown. Any error, timeout, or unparseable answer counts as an abstain, which keeps the decision with you. Needs at least one agent besides the session's own.

hint2.text: {ask} (where the agent asks {you} a multiple-choice question) takes a separate per-question path. c3 always shows you an answer panel and injects your picks back to the agent — that is the only way to answer it without a terminal, so it works regardless of this toggle. The consensus part only kicks in when it's {on}: the voters answer every question and the decider summarizes and reconciles answers that mean the same thing, so questions everyone agrees on get pre-filled or auto-answered and only the rest are left for you. With consensus off, no voting runs and you fill the whole panel yourself.

majority.label: Allow majority rule (a tie or no clear majority still defers to you)

voters.hint: Choose who votes. Voting is always limited to enabled agents of the session's own vendor (different vendors never vote); custom only narrows within that set.

skillRepos.hint: External git repositories whose SKILL.md files are mounted into every supported vendor's skill discovery directory at the configured ref's latest head.

repo.parseHelp: Paste a GitHub URL — ref and subpath are extracted automatically

ref.required: A git ref (branch / tag / commit) is required

install.label: Install
install.tooltip: Clone the configured ref and link this skill into every supported vendor

sandbox.hint: Enable container sandboxing for this project. Choose a sandbox definition from the system settings. The sandbox runs every tool execution in an isolated container with the configured resource limits.

name.label: Sandbox definition
name.empty: No sandbox definitions available. Add one in System Settings first.

agents.label: Agents allowed in sandbox
agents.hint: Pick which custom agents may run inside the sandbox container.
agents.empty: No eligible agents. Only enabled custom agents can run in the sandbox.

pattern.tooltip: Glob filter on file names — * matches all; e.g. *.ts or *.ts,*.tsx

search.timedOut: Search timed out; results may be incomplete.

expand.tooltip: Expand the file tree (double its width)

collapse.tooltip: Collapse the file tree back to normal width

tabs.empty: Select a file to view its contents.

consensus.title: Consensus decision
consensus.lead: Resolved automatically by multi-agent consensus — no action needed.

error.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.

session.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
session.invalid: Your session is no longer valid. Please sign in again.

activate.urlFallback: If the browser did not open, paste this URL: {url}

license.startFailed: License activation failed to start. Check that internet connectivity and the license-server are available.

refresh.label: Refresh validity
refresh.failed: Couldn't refresh the validity date. Check your connection and try again.
